scripts.build:prod:android: npm run barrels && node build.js android -c --type-check none
scripts.build:prod:ios: npm run barrels && node build.js ios -c --type-check none
scripts.build:dev:android: npm run barrels && node build.js android --type-check none
scripts.build:dev:ios: npm run barrels && node build.js ios --type-check none
scripts.build:watch:android: npm run barrels && node build.js android -t frida -w --type-check none
scripts.build:watch:ios: npm run barrels && node build.js ios -w -t frida --type-check none
scripts.build:test:android: npm run barrels && mkdir -p dist && frida-compile --type-check none tests/android/agent-runner.ts -o dist/agent-test-android.js
scripts.build:test:ios: npm run barrels && mkdir -p dist && frida-compile --type-check none tests/ios/agent-runner.ts -o dist/agent-test-ios.js
scripts.test:android: npm run build:test:android && node tests/run-tests.js -p dist/agent-test-android.js -usb
scripts.test:ios:usb: npm run build:test:ios && node tests/run-tests.js -p dist/agent-test-ios.js -usb
scripts.test:ios:local: npm run build:test:ios && node tests/run-tests.js -p dist/agent-test-ios.js
